features: 【Large quantity】totally 20 pieces hair extension clips are provided, enough quantity for your demand, meet your various purpose.
【Sturdy material】the hair wig clip is made of quality rubber and stainless steel, durable and safe to use, soft rubber make it comfortable to wear, can be applied for a long time.

【Safe design】Our Metal Snap Clips have a u shape design with 6 teeth, ensures harmless to your scalp, silicone bar can protect your hair and scale stay away from drag and injury, and the little holes provide convenience for linking or sewing the wig.

【Functional clips】Our Metal Snap Clips great for wigs, hair weaves, etc., these snap-comb clips can help you to finish your DIY hair extension, set and fit your wigs, hair extensions and hairpiece easily.
【Size and color】each clip measures 3.3 x 1.5 cm/ 1.3 x 0.6 inches, proper size for hair extension, suitable for most wigs.
description: Product Description 6-teeth Hair Extension Clip Made of high quality metal material, safe to use, long time use does not fade and deformation. Our 9-tooth hairpin design will not damage your scalp and silicone stick will protect your hair and scales from being scratched. Small as it is, this small wig clip works great on holding wig tightly. The wig clips for hair extensions are not only suitable for most wigs, but also as good assistant for hair extension, and help fix hairpieces and fasten hats. Sufficient for you to make any hair style or share with your friends. Product Features Quantity Material Elegant Appearance Multiple Color Large Quantity Convenient to use Easy to operate Press down to open and press up to close Resilient rubber Polish and smooth edges, with resilient rubber. 6-teeth Proper size, suit for most hair.
